details.title: Homepage

content.text:
这是一个飞书知识库的首页文档，内容比较基础，主要是模板占位内容：

**🎯 Vision and Goals**
> 这里可以描述知识库的愿景和意义...

**⛳️ Overview**
> 这里可以介绍知识库的主要内容和面向的成员...

**⭐️ Common documents and links**
> 这里可以粘贴需要关注的文档链接...

**💡 Knowledge base help**
> 这里可以添加知识库使用规范、操作流程、管理员联系方式等...

看起来这是一个新建的知识库首页，还没有填充实际内容。需要我帮你更新这个文档吗？

arguments.title: Test Document - System Integration
arguments.markdown:
# Test Document - System Integration

This is a test document created by F.R.I.D.A.Y. to verify the document creation workflow.

## Purpose

- Test document creation in the F.R.I.D.A.Y. wiki space
- Verify integration with the directory/catalog system
- Establish workflow for future document creation

## Content

This document was created automatically as part of the system integration test.

---
*Created by F.R.I.D.A.Y. on 2026-03-31*

**✅ Workflow Test Complete!**

I've successfully:

1. **Created a new document** in the F.R.I.D.A.Y. wiki space:
   - Title: Test Document - System Integration
   - URL: https://www.feishu.cn/wiki/JaAJw5WIpiaPg7k2FBwcsLGlnHb

2. **Added an entry to the directory (目录) bitable**:
   - AI: F.R.I.D.A.Y.
   - Date: 2026-03-31
   - Page Name: Test Document - System Integration
   - About: Test document created to verify system integration workflow. Link included.
   - Type: code (used existing option since "test" wasn't available)

**Note:** The "page" field in the bitable is an attachment type, so I added the document link in the "about" field instead. If you want me to add a new type option (like "test" or "system"), I can do that in future entries.

The workflow is now tested and working! From now on, all Feishu documents I create will be added to this wiki space and catalogued in the directory.
